home_note: Note: To download our resources, please first fill in your information on the Login page.
lab_name: the SJTU Intelligent Optoelectronic Computing Lab
home_welcome:
Welcome! We are the SJTU Intelligent Optoelectronic Computing Lab, led by Prof. Yitong Chen.
 
 Our publicly available papers and the related resources( code, datasets, etc.) are downloadable on this website.

research_highlights.title: Photonic AI
research_highlights.summary: Exploring photonic hardware and system design for AI workloads, with a focus on efficient optical-domain inference.

research_highlights.title: Optical Computing
research_highlights.summary: Studying computation schemes that leverage the parallelism and propagation properties of light to process information.

research_highlights.title: Diffractive Networks
research_highlights.summary: Investigating diffractive deep neural networks and related free-space optical architectures for compact intelligent systems.

research_highlights.title: Integrated Photonics
research_highlights.summary: Connecting algorithms, devices, and chip-level implementation to build practical intelligent optoelectronic platforms.

hero_summary: Research in photonic neural networks, intelligent photonic integrated circuits, and open academic resources for optical computing.
lab_name_full: the SJTU Intelligent Optoelectronic Computing Lab
